svg.title: Single-Cell Transformer Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing how a cell's gene expression vector flows through gene tokenization, CLS token prepending, transformer encoder layers with self-attention, and a classification head to predict cell type.
svg.text: scaled gene expression vector — one value per gene

g.text: 4 heads · each gene attends to all genes

svg.text: LayerNorm + residual connections around each sub-layer

g.text: B cells · CD14+ Mono · CD4+T · Dendritic · NK/CD8+T · Platelets
